title: elaphoglossum brevissimum
intro: Elaphoglossum brevissimum, also known as the Dwarf Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is native to tropical forests in Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum brevissimum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum brevissimum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
